comments: This allows you hide or show the overlay in the top right of the screen when XRay is enabled
The radius area (in chunks in each direction) that XRay will search within.
This is in each direction so a radius of 1 will be a 3x3 area, a radius of 2 will be a 5x5 area, etc.
When true, lava will automatically be added to the scan list when XRay is enabled.
